findings.summary: In two of the three engagements the firm presents Senior Consultant Jennifer Fletcher to the client as the engagement lead over Principal Consultant Robert Miller, the manager she reports to, who does the hands-on work under her direction.
findings.evidence: d:0001: "Jennifer Fletcher, our Senior Consultant, will lead the engagement ... Robert Miller, our Principal Consultant, will spend the days on your floor." d:0008: "Jennifer Fletcher, our Senior Consultant, will lead the engagement ... Robert Miller, our Principal Consultant, will work the operating side alongside her." foundation.json has Jennifer (Senior Consultant) reports_to Robert (Principal Consultant); only the Dean PLC pricing study (d:0005) has the higher-titled Principal leading. The split matches the two personas (Jennifer methodical/process-runner, Robert the floor SME), so it reads as deliberate small-firm role fluidity rather than an error. Recorded as an observation, not a defect.
